message:
fix: replace stale beads.db check with metadata.json in ensureBeadsDirForPath (bd-rev6)

ensureBeadsDirForPath checked for beads.db (SQLite artifact) to detect
existing databases. With Dolt, storage is under .beads/dolt/, so the
check always failed, causing unnecessary re-initialization attempts.

- Check for metadata.json instead of beads.db as the canonical marker
- Use dolt.NewFromConfigWithOptions instead of dolt.New with stale path

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/polecats/jade
Rig: beads
Role: polecats
